guiComponent showcase
OverviewPrimitivesFormsInteractiveHTMX

Showcase

Testable form workflow

A realistic release request example that exercises explicit labels, helper text, validation copy, and typed selection controls.

Release guardrail

The alert and action row frame the workflow before a user starts filling it in.

Review before deploy

Production changes require an incident rollback plan and an approver from the owning team.

Deployment request

FormField coordinates common field wiring, while the custom ticket block shows direct use of label, helper text, and error text.

Shown in Slack notifications and the deployment feed.

Summarize the blast radius, rollback steps, and what changed.

Use the CAB ticket for high-risk changes and link it in the rollout note.

Ticket ownership has not been assigned yet.

Review settings

These controls are rendered directly so tests can prove individual component behavior without relying only on composed wrappers.

Approval path

Pick the window that matches the primary on-call rotation.
